meaning: n.<法>具中国艺术风格的物品(尤指欧洲18世纪所摹仿的家具,纺织品,陶瓷等的花样设计或装饰),中国艺术风格
examples: The final part summarizes the features and impacts of Delftware's Chinoiserie.
These adaptations of Chinese art, called Chinoiserie, remained popular in Europe throughout the 18th century.
The visages of European music and its connection with Chinoiserie of the 18th century are summarized in this paper.
Some noted French trends of the past such as Japonisme and Chinoiserie have made a profound impact on French culture.
At Cannes, she goes for full-on glamour in flowing diaphanous gowns from Elie Saab or in intricately beaded and embroidered chinoiserie dresses.
